productName: SPR - 1g Infused Joint - Gas Face x Gushers
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Gas Face x Gushers and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of tar, chemical, and diesel, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
